name: EMERSON RADIO CORP
summary: Emerson Radio Corp. designs, sources, imports, and markets houseware and consumer electronic products under the Emerson brand, including microwave ovens, compact refrigerators, clock radios, Bluetooth speakers, televisions, karaoke machines, heaters, fans, and security products. The company sells primarily through U.S. mass merchandisers and online marketplaces such as Amazon and Walmart, and licenses its trademarks to third parties globally through licensing agents.
